NEXTAUTH_URL.description: The URL of your deployed app (e.g., https://mavio.vercel.app)

NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: A random string used to encrypt session tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth client ID from Google Cloud Console

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth client secret from Google Cloud Console

AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID.description: Azure AD client ID from Azure Portal

AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Azure AD client secret from Azure Portal

AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID.description: Azure AD tenant ID from Azure Portal

HF_API_KEY.description: Hugging Face API key from https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens

DATABASE_URL.description: Neon Postgres connection string (pooler URL recommended)

DIRECT_URL.description: Neon Postgres direct connection string (for migrations)

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: 32-byte hex string for IMAP password encryption. Generate with: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"
